creator: info@juanmolina.eu
text:
The upcoming update to xorg-server 1.14 breaks ABI compatibility with the x11/nvidia-driver-173 driver. See below:

================ WARNING WARNING WARNING WARNING ================
This server has a video driver ABI version of 14.1 that is not
supported by this NVIDIA driver. Please check
http://www.nvidia.com/ for driver updates or downgrade to an X
server with a supported driver ABI.
=================================================================
(EE) Segmentation fault at address 0x4
(EE)
Fatal server error:
(EE) Caught signal 11 (Segmentation fault). Server aborting


There is an NVIDIA update to the current version of the driver adding "support for X.org xserver ABI 15":
http://www.nvidia.com/Download/driverResults.aspx/71305/en-us
